extends.description:
Extends is the Qualified Name or Short Name of another Agent resource to
inherit from. When set, the engine merges the parent's skills and tools
arrays (parent first) and prepends the parent's instructions to this
agent's instructions.

instructions.description:
Instructions is the persona prompt populated from the Markdown body of
the file (below the closing front-matter delimiter).

triggers.description:
Triggers defines the architectural constraints on what can invoke this agent
(e.g., "human", "agent"). An empty list means the agent can be triggered
by anything.

models.description:
Models is a prioritized list of LLM model identifiers to use (e.g.,
["gpt-4o", "claude-3-5-sonnet"]). The runtime should attempt to use the
first available model.

temperature.description: Temperature controls the randomness of the model's output (0.0–2.0).

thinking.description: Thinking specifies the runtime configuration for extended reasoning (e.g., type: effort, effort: high). Overrides the provider's default.

skills.description:
Skills is a list of file paths (relative to the FS root) that reference
Skill resources this agent is allowed to use.

commands.description:
Commands is a list of file paths (relative to the FS root) that
reference Command resources this agent can invoke.

policies.description: Policies defines security and access policies.

AgentSpec.description: AgentSpec contains the configuration details for an Agent resource.

instructions.description:
Instructions is the expertise prompt populated from the Markdown body
of the file (below the closing front-matter delimiter).

models.description:
Models is a prioritized list of LLM model identifiers to use for this
command (e.g., ["gpt-4o-mini", "claude-3-haiku"]). Overrides agent defaults.

tools.description:
Tools is a list of resource refs (names or paths) restricting which
Tool resources can be used while executing this command.

hints.description:
Hints is an ordered list of argument hints (e.g., ["ticker", "year"])
that UIs can use for autocompletion and runtimes can use for positional
template substitution.

CommandSpec.description: CommandSpec contains the configuration details for a Command resource.

MCPPolicies.description: MCPPolicies defines inclusion and exclusion rules for resources exposed by an MCP server.

endpoint.description: HTTP URL for the MCP server if type: sse

command.description: Command to start the MCP server via stdio

env.description: Environment variables for the MCP server

annotations.description: Default safety profile for all exposed tools

policies.description: Controls which external MCP resources are exposed

overrides.description: Tool-specific annotation overrides (key is tool name)

MCPSpec.description: MCPSpec contains the configuration details for an MCP resource.

name.description: Name is the unique identifier for the resource within its kind.

description.description: Description is a short human-readable summary of the resource.

displayName.description: DisplayName is an optional pretty-printed label for UIs.

labels.description: Labels are arbitrary key-value pairs for categorisation and filtering.

Metadata.description: Metadata holds the identifying and descriptive fields shared by every resource kind.

defaultModel.description: Model to use if none specified

ModelProviderSpec.description: ModelProviderSpec contains the configuration details for a ModelProvider resource.

postInstall.description: Commands to run after the plugin is downloaded (e.g., ["go", "install", "./..."])

PluginHooks.description: PluginHooks defines lifecycle commands to run when a plugin is installed.

instructions.description: Instructions is the Markdown body of the plugin file.

resourceDir.description: The relative path within the repository where the loader should look for resources

exports.description: Glob patterns defining which resources are exposed to consumers

PluginSpec.description: PluginSpec contains the configuration details for a Plugin resource.

Policies.description: Policies defines security and access policies.

header.description: Custom header name if type is "api-key"

ProviderAuth.description: ProviderAuth defines how to authenticate with the model provider.

ProviderModel.description: ProviderModel describes a specific model available from a provider.

attachment.description: Whether the model supports file/document attachments

tools.description: Whether the model supports function/tool calling (tool_call)

structuredOutput.description: Whether the model supports strict structured outputs

temperature.description: Whether the model allows configuring the sampling temperature

thinking.description: List of supported reasoning configuration strategies

modalities.description: Defines supported input and output data modalities

input.description: Base cost for input tokens (typically per 1M tokens)

cacheRead.description: Cost for reading from prompt cache

cacheWrite.description: Cost for writing to prompt cache

label.description: A human-readable label for the tier (e.g., "Context over 200k")

tier.description: The condition that triggers this pricing

ProviderModelLimits.description: ProviderModelLimits defines the token limits for a specific model.

type.description: The strategy this model supports: toggle, effort, budget, or adaptive

isDefault.description: Marks this strategy as the primary default

maxBudgetTokens.description: Used if type: budget. The maximum allowed thinking tokens

include.description: Glob patterns for resources to expose

exclude.description: Glob patterns for resources to block (applied after include)

ResourceFilter.description: ResourceFilter defines inclusion and exclusion rules based on glob patterns.

useWhen.description:
UseWhen provides explicit routing instructions to the LLM on when to
trigger this skill (e.g., "Use this when the user asks for X").

keywords.description: Keywords is an array of semantic tags used for discovery and prompting.

instructions.description:
Instructions is the expertise prompt populated from the Markdown body
of the file (below the closing front-matter delimiter).

SkillSpec.description: SkillSpec contains the configuration details for a Skill resource.

ToolAnnotation.description: ToolAnnotation defines the safety profile for a tool.

ToolPolicies.description: ToolPolicies defines restrictions for tool usage.

instructions.description: Instructions is the detailed description of what the tool does, populated from the Markdown body.

name.description: Used only when defined inline in a Toolkit

env.description: Environment variables injected into the process

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema object defining arguments the LLM must pass

outputSchema.description: JSON Schema object defining the tool's output

annotations.description: Safety profile for Tool Execution Security

ToolSpec.description: ToolSpec contains the configuration details for a Tool resource.

ToolkitSpec.description: ToolkitSpec contains the configuration details for a Toolkit resource.

instructions.description: Instructions is the detailed description of what the tool does, populated from the Markdown body.

name.description: Used only when defined inline in a Toolkit

env.description: Environment variables injected into the process

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema object defining arguments the LLM must pass

outputSchema.description: JSON Schema object defining the tool's output

annotations.description: Safety profile for Tool Execution Security

ToolkitTool.description: ToolkitTool can be either a reference to an external file or a fully inline ToolSpec.

WorkspaceDefSpec.description: WorkspaceDefSpec contains configuration for a Workspace resource.

WorkspacePlugin.description: WorkspacePlugin defines an external repository to load as a plugin.

Policies.description: Policies defines security and access policies.

include.description: Glob patterns for resources to expose

exclude.description: Glob patterns for resources to block (applied after include)

ResourceFilter.description: ResourceFilter defines inclusion and exclusion rules based on glob patterns.

ToolPolicies.description: ToolPolicies defines restrictions for tool usage.

title: Workspace Agent Resource Protocol (WARP)
description: Schema for WARP resources (Agents, Skills, Commands, etc.)
